name: jira
description: Jira Cloud connector — get / create / update / delete / search issues, add comments, transition status. Pick the action with the `operation` input (mirrors n8n's Jira node). Auth via a workspace `generic` config holding host, email, apiToken.

configRefs.name: jira
configRefs.description: Generic config holding host (e.g. https://acme.atlassian.net), email, apiToken.

operation.description: Which Jira API call to run.

config.description: Workspace config name to read credentials from. Default: 'jira'.

issueKey.description: Issue key (e.g. ACME-123). Required for: get / update / delete / comment.add / transition / transitions.list.

projectKey.description: Project key (e.g. ACME). Required for: create.

summary.description: Issue title. Used by create (required) and update.

issueType.description: Issue type name, e.g. 'Task', 'Bug', 'Story'. Default: 'Task'. Used by create.

description.description: Plain text gets wrapped into Atlassian Document Format. Used by create / update.

assignee.description: Assignee accountId (NOT email). Pass empty string in update to unassign.

fields.description: Restrict response fields. Used by get / search.

comment.description: Comment body. Plain text gets wrapped into ADF. Used by comment.add and (optionally) transition.

visibility.description: Optional visibility restriction for the comment.

transitionId.description: Transition ID. Used by transition; takes precedence over transitionName.

transitionName.description: Human-readable transition name, e.g. 'Done'. The plugin resolves it from the issue's available transitions.

resolution.description: Optional resolution name to set when transitioning, e.g. 'Done'.

operation.description: Echo of the input operation that ran.

status.description: HTTP status from the underlying Jira REST call.

result.description: Operation-specific payload. Issue for get/create. Array of issues + paging for search. Comment for comment.add. Transition list for transitions.list. For update/delete/transition: a small ack object with issueKey + url.

url.description: Deep-link to the affected issue (when applicable).
